prompt:
Goal: Create an ornate vertical fantasy “official commemorative love stamp sheet” for an anime girl, preserving her delicate face shape, eyes, hairstyle, hair color, expression, outfit colors, transparency, and soft atmosphere, as if her form of love is being delivered across the world.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, elegant stationery and postage-stamp composition, soft pastel blue, cream, white, and pale gold palette, romantic translucent lighting, dreamy bokeh, high-detail anime illustration mixed with luxury paper-craft design.

Main character: A blonde anime girl named Nozomu with long pale honey-blonde hair, blue ribbons, frilled blue-and-white bonnet or headpiece, lace-trimmed dress, pearl-like accessories, gentle innocent expression, clear blue eyes, and a transparent romantic aura. Keep her appearance consistent across every stamp portrait.

Layout: Design one large commemorative stamp panel in the upper middle and exactly 8 smaller stamps below it arranged in a 4 by 2 grid. Each stamp has perforated edges, thin gold borders, tiny decorative hearts, and matching pastel floral backgrounds. Surround the sheet with postal marks, handwritten accents, envelopes, ribbons, wax seals, rose petals, blue roses, stationery, and a fountain pen.

Top header text: At the top center, write “NOZOMU” in refined serif gold letters, below it “LOVE STAMP COLLECTION,” and below that large Japanese hiragana “のぞむ.” Add a small Japanese subtitle: “この想いが、世界中へ届きますように.” Include circular postmarks reading “FIRST DAY 05.20 2026” and “LOVE POST TO SOMEONE,” plus a small blue bird stamp in the upper right reading “LOVE FOREVER 2026.” Add a hanging tag in the upper left tied to a glossy blue ribbon that says “LIMITED LOVE ISSUE No. 20260520.”

Large featured stamp: One wide landscape-format stamp with the girl in a sunlit floral room, blue and pink flowers in the background, cake or small dessert near the lower left, ornate gold corner flourishes, value text “120 LOVE” in the upper left, and a gold handwritten signature “Nozomu♡” at the lower right.

Eight smaller stamps, counted exactly: 1) “110 HOPE,” girl holding a bouquet, soft floral background. 2) “84 MEMORY,” girl holding a small red pendant or charm near her chest. 3) “100 PRAYER,” girl with eyes closed and hands clasped in prayer. 4) “LOVE 01,” girl cuddling pale blue plush or soft flowers. 5) “89 PROMISE,” night scene with blue lighting and tiny glowing lights, girl looking over her shoulder. 6) “07 UNSENT,” melancholic side-profile night scene with a round postmark “11.07 2022” and small Japanese line “届かなかった言葉も、愛だった。” 7) “99 REUNION,” girl reaching one hand forward toward the viewer in a bright floral setting. 8) “05 LETTER,” girl holding a letter close in warm window light.

Bottom text and decorations: Center bottom Japanese line “届かなかった言葉も、愛だった。” with English subtitle “DELIVER THIS HEART.” Add “No. 000520 / 2026” near the lower right. Include a blue card at bottom left reading “SPECIAL MEMORIAL STAMP LIMITED EDITION,” a small envelope card reading “TO SOMEONE, SOMEWHERE,” a cream envelope with a blue wax seal at bottom right, a gold wax seal at bottom left, scattered tiny hearts, petals, and shimmer.

Visual style: Highly polished anime art, romantic official stamp sheet, luxurious paper texture, fine gold foil details, pale blue satin ribbons, soft daylight, sparkling translucent atmosphere, delicate floral ornamentation, shallow depth of field, crisp readable typography, no modern UI elements, no watermark, no extra stamps beyond the one large stamp and exactly 8 smaller stamps.
